notes: Comprehensive research on all 20 companies. Confidence levels: verified=publicly confirmed, likely=strong inference from multiple sources, speculative=single source or inferred.

companies.name: Lightning AI (merged with Voltage Park)

last_round.notes: Merger completed January 21, 2026. Combined ARR exceeds $500M.

all_rounds.notes: Lightning AI and Voltage Park merge to create AI-native cloud, valued at $2.5B+

recent_news.headline: Lightning AI and Voltage Park Complete Merger to Create the First Cloud Built for AI — $2.5B+ valuation, $500M+ ARR

infrastructure.capacity_plans: AI-native cloud; 'virtually unlimited GPU burst capacity' for users

financials.growth_signals: Merger creates combined entity with massive GPU fleet and software platform

companies.strategic_context: Post-merger Lightning AI is one of the largest independent AI clouds globally with 35K+ owned GPUs and $500M+ ARR. As they integrate Voltage Park infra with Lightning AI software, treasury/cash management, GPU asset financing, and working capital become significant pain points. Corgi's product (GPU collateral/treasury optimization) maps directly to managing their massive, owned GPU fleet. Key outreach: President Ozan Kaya (finance background) and new CFO when confirmed.
companies.corgi_fit_rationale: Large owned GPU fleet, $500M+ ARR, post-merger treasury complexity — strong fit for Corgi's GPU-collateralized financing or treasury tooling. Leadership is finance-aware (former Voltage Park CEO Kaya likely oversees capital structure). No public CFO yet = need to track announcement.

companies.corgi_fit_rationale: Small Nordic private credit fund that has dipped into GPU financing. Relationship with Verda (Corgi's top-ranked prospect) makes them a relevant secondary contact. Good for introductions and understanding the Verda capital structure. Not a large direct ACV target.
